birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Birds have been found in Iceland in winter with Greenland-origin minerals in their gizzards, having crossed the 300 km wide Denmark Strait, and a bird ringed in summer on Disko Island off the west coast of Greenland was recovered over 1000 km further south in Qaqortoq the following winter
